title: EventTypeRegistry
description: Registry mapping all 20 RetroEvent.EventType values to their payload schema reference and an example payload. Used as documentation and contract reference for SSE consumers.

PARTICIPANT_JOINED.description: A participant has joined the retro session.

PARTICIPANT_LEFT.description: A participant has left the retro session.

SESSION_STARTED.description: The retro session has transitioned from LOBBY to active.

STEP_ADVANCED.description: The facilitator has advanced to the next step.

RETRO_CREATED.description: A new retro session has been created.

PHASE_STARTED.description: A new retrospective phase has started. Payload is the phase name string.

NOTE_ADDED.description: A participant has submitted a response (note). Payload is a ResponseData object.

NOTE_UPDATED.description: A note's visibility was changed (privacy toggle) OR all notes in a step were batch-revealed. Payload is either a ResponseData object (single change) or an integer stepId (batch reveal).

NOTE_DELETED.description: A note/response has been deleted. Payload shape is ResponseData (matching NOTE_ADDED/NOTE_UPDATED for consistency).

VOTE_ADDED.description: A participant has added a vote. Payload shape TBD (not yet implemented in backend factory methods).

VOTE_REMOVED.description: A participant has removed a vote. Payload shape TBD (not yet implemented in backend factory methods).

GROUP_CREATED.description: A note group/cluster has been created. Payload shape TBD.

GROUP_UPDATED.description: A note group/cluster has been updated. Payload shape TBD.

GROUP_DELETED.description: A note group/cluster has been deleted. Payload shape TBD.

ACTION_CREATED.description: A SMART action point has been created. Payload shape TBD.

ACTION_UPDATED.description: A SMART action point has been updated. Payload shape TBD.

ACTION_DELETED.description: A SMART action point has been deleted. Payload shape TBD.

TIMER_STARTED.description: A step timer has been started or resumed.

TIMER_PAUSED.description: A step timer has been paused.

TIMER_FINISHED.description: A step timer has finished (countdown reached zero). No factory method yet, implied void payload.
